problem_statement: Scheduler-worker, read-only worker, failure receipt, and connector-promotion proof threads exist, but operators lack one schema-backed read model that summarizes worker receipt chain status without admitting live receipt-store reads or dispatch.
success_criteria: WorkerReceiptLedgerReadModel validates against a public JSON schema and Foundation Mode example
WorkerReceiptLedgerReadModel projects worker, lease, runtime receipt, failure, and connector-promotion refs into bounded chain summaries
WorkerReceiptLedgerReadModel blocks live receipt-store reads, worker dispatch, runtime receipt emission, connector calls, writes, terminal closure, and success claims
WorkerReceiptLedgerReadModel rejects summary-count drift from projected receipt chains
WorkerReceiptLedgerReadModel is covered by a focused validator, root test, protocol manifest entry, proof coverage matrix entry, and CI hook
constraints: source_receipt_store_live_read_performed remains false in the Foundation example
worker_dispatch_allowed remains false in the Foundation example
runtime_receipt_emission_allowed remains false in the Foundation example
connector_call_allowed remains false in the Foundation example
terminal_closure_allowed remains false in the Foundation example
success_claim_allowed remains false in the Foundation example
raw payloads and raw secrets remain excluded
